allProfiles.name: Kanye West
allProfiles.title: Rapper, Producer, Fashion Designer
allProfiles.excerpt: American rapper, producer, and fashion designer who has been one of the most influential figures in hip-hop and popular culture since the early 2000s.

allProfiles.name: Mel Gibson
allProfiles.title: Actor, Director, Producer
allProfiles.excerpt: American-Australian actor and filmmaker who achieved significant success in Hollywood before facing career setbacks due to controversial statements and legal issues.

allProfiles.name: Michael Jackson
allProfiles.title: Singer, Songwriter, Dancer
allProfiles.excerpt: American singer, songwriter and dancer, widely regarded as one of the most significant cultural figures of the 20th century and dubbed the 'King of Pop'.
